proofArtifacts.confirmScenario: temp config with decoration:screen_shader = ./candidate-screen-shader.frag confirmed through separate high-risk-watchdog CLI process
proofArtifacts.timeoutRestoreScenario: temp config with decoration:screen_shader mutation restored from backup through separate high-risk-watchdog CLI process after deadline
proofArtifacts.failureScenario: temp config restore failure writes a diagnostic result log after backup corruption
proofArtifacts.tempOnlyPathPolicy: all generated config, plan, result, and backup paths are under std::env::temp_dir() and are rejected if they look like /home/kyo/.config/hypr/hyprland.conf

proofDetails.planPersistedBeforeMutationProof: The test arms the watchdog with plan_path and result_log_path under a temp directory, asserts the persisted plan exists, reloads it through load_watchdog_plan, and verifies the proposed config mutation appears only after arming.
proofDetails.backupBeforeMutationProof: The loaded plan contains a backup_path that exists before separate-process confirm/timeout actions; backup_created_before_mutation is true in generated result logs.
proofDetails.fixtureTempMutationOnlyProof: The target config path is generated under std::env::temp_dir(); ensure_dry_run_target_path protects the plan, result, backup, and target paths.
proofDetails.separateProcessConfirmProof: The test invokes the hyprland-settings high-risk-watchdog CLI with action=confirm and the generated token; the result log records confirmed status and keeps the proposed temp mutation.
proofDetails.timeoutRestoreProof: The test invokes the high-risk-watchdog CLI with action=expire after the deadline; the result log records reverted status and the temp config rereads as the original value.
proofDetails.resultLogProof: Confirm, timeout restore, and failure scenarios each write result logs that are loaded and checked by tests.
proofDetails.visibleDisplayIndependentRecoveryProof: Generated recovery results set requires_visible_display=false and require no mouse, app UI, or Hyprland keybind path.
proofDetails.liveRenderStateIndependentRecoveryProof: Generated recovery results record reload_run=false, eval_run=false, lua_executed=false, active_runtime_modified=false, and active_config_modified=false; no shader compile or display proof is invoked.
proofDetails.failurePathProof: The test corrupts the backup before timeout restore, asserts the CLI exits nonzero, and verifies a failure result log with restore_attempted=true and restore_verified=false.

proofStillMissing: production write flow migration into the screen-shader display/render gate
standalone non-live shader compiler feasibility proof
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader production gate enforcement decision sprint: decide whether to migrate decoration.screen_shader production writes into the proven display/render watchdog gate, keep temporary writable candidate status, or propose block/removal with explicit user approval. Do not add compile-aware validation in that sprint unless separately approved.
